name: stems_pro_4track
description: Suede Labs professional 4-track stems separation service for producers, mixing and mastering engineers, remixers, DJs, sync teams, ML training pipelines, music supervisors, sample-pack creators, and agents building advanced audio workflows. Returns four clean, high-fidelity stems suitable for production work: vocals, drums, bass, and melody/other. Distinct from the basic 2-track service: this is the studio-grade split with full stem fidelity, lower bleed, and production-ready file delivery. Supports remix and mashup production, isolated-element sync clearance, surgical mixing rescue, sample mining, karaoke and instrumental delivery, ML training data preparation, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is a public audio URL plus optional output format; output is a set of four stem URLs plus duration and detected key/tempo metadata.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file to separate. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 15 minutes long.

output_format.description: Audio format for the returned stems. Use wav or flac for production work, mp3 for fast previews.

sample_rate.description: Sample rate of the returned stems. Use 48000 for video post-production deliverables.
